issue.title: archyde.com
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Android

*

Missed analytics or tracker

Brave

Mobile

https://www.archyde.com/pixel-11-google-arbeitet-an-face-id-ahnlicher-entsperrung/

issue.title: cafe.naver.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://cafe.naver.com/f-e/cafes/14062859/articles/5976798?boardtype=L&menuid=318&referrerAllArticles=false](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcafe.naver.com%2Ff-e%2Fcafes%2F14062859%2Farticles%2F5976798%3Fboardtype%3DL%26menuid%3D318%26referrerAllArticles%3Dfalse) ### Comment > 애드가드를 사용 중인데도 네이버 카페 게시글 하단의 배너 광고가 차단되지 않고 그대로 노출됩니다. > [이 웹사이트에서 광고 차단] 기능을 통해 직접 차단을 시도했으나, 회색 플래시 창이 화면을 가려 정상적으로 차단되지 않는 문제가 발생합니다. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/jpj3zijdrf48woggcg0gg0wosw0cc08kvkk4jgfwb4.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.3 (5240) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26100.0` Browser: | Edge License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | server: `System`

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/224151#issuecomment-3881324608

A user should add `veta.naver.com` manually if they accept risk of https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardSDNSFilter/pull/1926 and block the advert in Naver app.

issue.title: naver.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://naver.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fnaver.com) ### Comment > 네이버앱 광고 차단이 아예 되지를 않음 추가로 필터업데이트 해도 광고 차단이 안됨 ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2aljjnx3feo0gsk8okosgk8g08s048gpnbwxy8d4qs.png?nc=1)

Screenshot 3 ![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d4do3a3tbdskss0gwkog00soscg4ow48bzz10f26n8.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3ismfh2bh9s0owkswwc00oswoskoo88pq5k0lqgxb4.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.15 License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled DNS filtering: | server: `Vpn`
filters: `모름` Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base,
AdGuard Mobile Ads

Privacy:
AdGuard Tracking Protection

comment.body: A user should add `veta.naver.com` manually if they accept risk of https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardSDNSFilter/pull/1926 and block the advert in Naver app.

comment.body: Unable to block this such advert because the related connection is under HTTPS traffic that is also used in normal HTTPS traffic.
